title: Language Change
scenario: Change the language on a paired headset via Device Settings and confirm the update is applied after a software update.
steps: Pair and connect the headset to the device.
Select a new language from the scrollable list.
Confirm the update via the popup by tapping 'Update now' (or 'Later').
Wait for the software update to complete.
Observe that the user is returned to the Home Screen.
Verify that the selected language is properly applied throughout the interface.
expected: After the software update completes, the user is returned to the Home Screen and the selected language is properly applied.
